title: Lesson 1229: 振り, 振り, 振り出し...

items.gloss: swing; shake; wave; swinging; appearance; behaviour; pretence (pretense); show; pretending (to); going to restaurant, hotel etc. without a reservation or introduction; move (dance); postures; lead in (e.g. to a running joke, asking a question); lead up; unsewn part of a hanging sleeve on a traditional Japanese woman's garment; counter for swords, blades, etc.; not wearing underwear or pants
style; manner; way; after (period of time) again (e.g. meeting again after a year); for the first time in (period of time)
shaking (something) out; starting point; beginning; outset; drawing (e.g. of a bill); issue; draft; throw (of dice); infusion (remedy); shaker (e.g. saltshaker)
bad; poor; inferior; delinquent; hoodlum; hooligan
to (make something) quiver; to shake; to tremble; to vibrate
appendix; supplement; annex; extra (of a newspaper or magazine)
